articles.title_en: Hanoi's Yen Xa Wastewater Treatment Plant Nears Completion, Boosting Urban Water Quality
articles.summary_en: MONRE: Yen Xa Phase 2 completion by Q1 2027, drastically improving Hanoi river water quality. JICA-funded.

articles.title_en: MONRE Unveils New Green Incentives for Industrial Zone Wastewater Treatment Upgrades
articles.summary_en: MONRE offers new incentives for industrial zones to upgrade wastewater treatment. Aims for 80% advanced tech adoption.
articles.source: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE) Official Website

articles.title_en: Mekong Delta Launches First Major Public-Private Partnership for Integrated Water Management
articles.summary_en: MONRE backs new PPP in Mekong Delta for modular treatment and water reuse, boosting agricultural resilience.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Nationwide EPR Scheme Fully Enforced, Transforming Solid Waste Management by 2026
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's EPR (LEP 2020) fully enforced by 2026. Producers now drive recycling and sustainable packaging.
articles.source: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE)

articles.title_en: Major Cities Lead Vietnam's Mandatory Waste Sorting Rollout Ahead of National 2026 Deadlines
articles.summary_en: Hanoi & HCMC lead Vietnam's mandatory waste sorting by 2026. New systems boost recycling and organic waste diversion.

articles.title_en: Investment Surges in Waste-to-Energy Projects as Vietnam Aims for Sustainable Waste Disposal by 2026
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's WtE projects surge by 2026, reducing landfill reliance. It boosts clean energy and attracts private investment.
articles.source: Bloomberg Green, Ministry of Planning and Investment (MPI)

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $500M Loan for Vietnam's Mekong Delta Highway Expansion
articles.summary_en: ADB approved a $500M loan for Mekong Delta highway expansion, boosting regional connectivity and trade efficiency.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures ADB Funding for Coastal Climate Resilience and Renewable Energy Initiative
articles.summary_en: Vietnam received ADB funding for coastal climate resilience and renewable energy expansion, promoting green infrastructure.

articles.title_en: ADB Funds Smart City Initiatives and Digital Infrastructure Upgrade in Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City
articles.summary_en: ADB greenlights loan for smart city tech and digital infrastructure upgrades in Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City.

articles.title_en: ADB-Backed Central Vietnam Water Project Reaches Full Operational Capacity
articles.summary_en: The ADB-funded clean water and sanitation project in Da Nang and Quang Nam is now fully operational, providing safe water to over 1.5 million residents. This initiative significantly upgrades regional water infrastructure, enhancing public health and economic resilience.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves New $450 Million Loan for Vietnam's Mekong Delta Wastewater Management
articles.summary_en: The ADB has approved a new $450 million loan for Phase III of Vietnam's critical wastewater management and sanitation program in the Mekong Delta. This funding expands modern treatment facilities, reducing pollution and enhancing climate resilience for millions.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Smart Water Initiative: Digital Transformation in Clean Water Services
articles.summary_en: Vietnam is accelerating its 'Smart Water Initiative,' integrating IoT and AI into urban water management with ADB support. Pilot programs in major cities show significant reductions in water loss and improved service efficiency, setting a benchmark for sustainable development.

articles.title_en: World Bank Launches $180M Mekong Delta Water Security & Climate Resilience Project in Vietnam
articles.summary_en: World Bank initiates new project in Vietnam's Mekong Delta to enhance water supply resilience against climate change by 2030.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Accelerates Sustainable Water Management with World Bank's New Climate Adaptation Fund 2026
articles.summary_en: Vietnam partners with World Bank for a new fund to boost sustainable water management and climate adaptation in central regions.

articles.title_en: Innovative Technologies Deployed in World Bank-Funded Water Projects Across Northern Vietnam
articles.summary_en: New phase of World Bank water projects in Northern Vietnam focuses on smart infrastructure and digital solutions for efficiency.

articles.title_en: JICA Secures $800M Loan for Ho Chi Minh City Metro Line 3B Extension
articles.summary_en: JICA approves an $800M ODA loan for HCMC Metro Line 3B extension, enhancing urban green transport infrastructure.

articles.title_en: Vietnam, JICA Launch Major Mekong Delta Climate Resilience Grant Program
articles.summary_en: JICA provides a new grant for Mekong Delta climate resilience, focusing on sustainable environment and infrastructure.

articles.title_en: JICA Boosts Vietnam's Green Energy Infrastructure Investment by 30%
articles.summary_en: JICA pledges a 30% increase in loans and grants for Vietnam's green energy infrastructure, aiding climate goals.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's FDI Surge Continues in 2026, High-Tech Manufacturing Leads Industrial Park Growth
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's industrial parks attract robust FDI, especially in tech and green sectors, driving economic expansion.

articles.title_en: Major Infrastructure Projects Bolster Vietnam's Industrial Park Competitiveness by 2026
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's critical infrastructure upgrades, nearing completion, enhance industrial park appeal for investors.

articles.title_en: Green Industrial Parks and Skilled Workforce Initiatives Define Vietnam's 2026 FDI Strategy
articles.summary_en: Vietnam emphasizes sustainable industrial parks and skilled labor development for future FDI inflows.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Fast-Tracks Key Offshore Wind Projects Under PDP8 for 2026
articles.summary_en: Vietnam accelerates offshore wind development under PDP8, with several projects securing approvals for 2026 launch.

articles.title_en: Solar Energy Surges in Vietnam, PDP8 Highlights Grid Integration Needs
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's solar capacity expands rapidly. PDP8 emphasizes grid upgrades to manage new renewable energy influx.

articles.title_en: International Investment Fuels Vietnam's Renewable Energy Boom by 2026
articles.summary_en: PDP8 draws significant foreign investment into Vietnam's renewable sector, accelerating wind and solar growth.

articles.title_en: Long Thanh Airport's Key Expressways Set for 2026 Operational Readiness
articles.summary_en: Critical expressways connecting to Long Thanh International Airport are nearing completion, crucial for its 2026 phased opening.

articles.title_en: HCMC Metro Line 2 Sees Rapid Progress Amidst Calls for Future Airport Link by 2026
articles.summary_en: HCMC Metro Line 2 progresses rapidly. Discussions on a future Long Thanh Airport connection intensify by 2026.

articles.title_en: Crucial Bien Hoa-Vung Tau Expressway Sections Aim for 2026 Opening, Boosting Regional Access
articles.summary_en: Bien Hoa-Vung Tau Expressway sections target 2026 opening, improving critical access to Long Thanh area.

articles.title_en: Ho Chi Minh City Launches AI-Powered Integrated Operations Center for Urban Efficiency
articles.summary_en: HCMC's new IOC, integrating AI and IoT, promises enhanced traffic, safety, and e-governance by 2027.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Unveils National Smart City Framework 2.0: Focus on 5G & Digital Twins by 2030
articles.summary_en: New national framework 2.0 emphasizes 5G, IoT, and digital twin technology for sustainable urban growth.

articles.title_en: Da Nang's Cloud-Based IOC Revolutionizes Environmental Monitoring for Green Smart City Vision
articles.summary_en: Da Nang's cloud-native IOC integrates environmental data, boosting sustainable development initiatives in 2026.
